$comment: Single source of truth for every environment variable the codebase reads. Compared against grep'd source via `npm run check-env`, and against a pulled deployment env when a path is passed. See docs/operations/env-audit.md for the runbook.

LICENSE_SIGNING_KEY.description: HMAC secret for signing/verifying license tokens. Rotate triggers full re-issue.

STRIPE_SECRET_KEY.description: Stripe API key used by checkout / recover / admin / billing paths.

STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET.description: Webhook signing secret used to verify Stripe event signatures.

STRIPE_ALLOWED_PRICES.description: Comma-separated list of allowed Stripe price IDs. Defence against price-id tampering at checkout creation.

UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL.description: Upstash REST URL (canonical name). Used by sync / catalog / license / stripe seen-events stores. Accept either this OR KV_REST_API_URL.

UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_TOKEN.description: Upstash REST token paired with UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL.

KV_REST_API_URL.description: Vercel-Marketplace-injected legacy name for the Upstash REST URL. Auto-detected as a fallback; do not set manually when UPSTASH_REDIS_REST_URL is present.

KV_REST_API_TOKEN.description: Vercel-Marketplace-injected legacy name paired with KV_REST_API_URL.

GITHUB_FEEDBACK_TOKEN.description: Fine-grained GitHub PAT with `issues: write` for /api/feedback. Without it the endpoint 503s gracefully.

GITHUB_REPO.description: owner/repo target for /api/feedback issue creation (e.g. forcingfx/feedzero).

ADMIN_API_KEY.description: Shared secret for admin endpoints (license find / revoke / re-issue).

OPERATOR_ALERT_URL.description: Webhook URL (Slack / Discord / generic) that receives operator alerts on 5xx and sync regressions. Optional but recommended.

RATE_LIMIT_HASH_SALT.description: Salt for the IP-hashing rate limiter so a stolen Upstash dump cannot be reversed into raw IPs.

APP_VERSION.description: Reported by /api/health-version. Injected by the build at compile time via scripts/build-api.js; leave unset in the env.

FEED_USER_AGENT.description: Operator-supplied User-Agent for outbound /api/feed and /api/page requests. Overrides the default browser-like UA used under SELF_HOSTED.

BLOB_READ_WRITE_TOKEN.description: Legacy Vercel Blob credential. Only set if rolling back to the pre-Upstash sync backend; the Upstash backend supersedes it (ADR 008).

SYNC_STORAGE.description: Explicit override for the sync adapter (`upstash` | `vercel-blob` | `filesystem` | `memory`). Auto-detect is preferred; only set when the operator deliberately wants a different backend than the credentials imply.

DATA_DIR.description: Directory for the filesystem sync adapter's vault files. Self-host only.

PORT.description: Listen port for the Hono standalone server (npm run serve). Self-host only.

SELF_HOSTED.description: Runtime flag (`1`) that forces paid-tier UI off and switches the proxy to a browser-like UA (ADR 014). Self-host only.

VITE_SELF_HOSTED.description: Build-time twin of SELF_HOSTED. Set during `npm run build:all` so the SPA bundle hides the Subscribe UI.

VITE_PAID_TIER_VISIBLE.description: Build-time flag that flips the paid-tier UI visibility independently of SELF_HOSTED. Default off; production sets it to surface checkout flows.

VITE_PRICE_PERSONAL_MONTHLY.description: Stripe price id for the Personal monthly plan, baked into the SPA bundle for the Checkout call.

VITE_PRICE_PERSONAL_YEARLY.description: Stripe price id for the Personal yearly plan.

VITE_APP_VERSION.description: Version string surfaced in the About dialog. Injected at build time; leave unset in the env.

VITE_EXTENSION_ENABLED.description: Build-time flag that shows the browser-extension affordance in the SPA.
